question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: He ... a book when I saw him.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: By the time we arrived, the train ... .

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: They ... in London since 2010.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: Water ... at 100 degrees Celsius.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: I ... him yesterday afternoon.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: Look at the dark clouds! It ... .

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos so'zni qo'ying: I usually ... coffee, but today I ... tea.

subject: ingliz
question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos artiklni qo'ying: ... Earth goes around ... Sun.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos predlogni qo'ying: I am looking forward ... seeing you.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos predlogni qo'ying: We arrived ... the airport early.

subject: ingliz
question: Bosh harflar bilan yozilgan so'zning sinonimini toping: He is very WEALTHY.

question: Bosh harflar bilan yozilgan so'zning antonimini toping: The test was relatively EASY.

question: Mos so'zni tanlang: It is hard to ... up children nowadays.

question: Mos so'zni tanlang: A person who writes books is a ... .
explanation: Kitob yozuvchi kishi 'author' (muallif) deb ataladi.

explanation: 'Do a favor' iborasi yaxshilik qilmoq degan ma'noni anglatadi.

question: Bosh harflar bilan yozilgan so'zning antonimini toping: The water in the river is very DEEP.

question: Mos so'zni tanlang: If I ... a millionaire, I would buy an island.

question: Mos so'zni tanlang: If she had studied harder, she ... the exam.

question: Mos so'zni tanlang: We won't go to the park ... the weather is nice.

subject: ingliz
question: O'zlashtirma gapning to'g'ri shaklini toping: He said, "I am reading a book".
options: He said that he is reading a book.
He said that he was reading a book.
He said that I was reading a book.
He says that he was reading a book.
explanation: Zamon bir pog'ona orqaga siljiydi (Present Continuous -> Past Continuous).

subject: ingliz
question: O'zlashtirma gapning to'g'ri shaklini toping: She asked, "Where do you live?"
options: She asked where do I live.
She asked where did I live.
explanation: Maxsus so'roqli gaplarda yordamchi fe'l tushib qoladi va zamon moslashadi.

subject: ingliz
question: O'zlashtirma gapning to'g'ri shaklini toping: "Don't open the window", she said to him.
options: She told him to not open the window.
She told him don't open the window.
She told him not to open the window.
She said him not to open the window.
explanation: Inkor shakldagi buyruq o'zlashtirma gapda 'not to' orqali ifodalanadi.

subject: ingliz
question: O'zlashtirma gapning to'g'ri shaklini toping: "I will call you tomorrow," he said.
options: He said he will call me tomorrow.
He said he would call me tomorrow.
He said he would call me the next day.
He said he will call me the next day.
explanation: 'Will' 'would' ga, 'tomorrow' esa 'the next day' ga o'zgaradi.

subject: ingliz
question: O'zlashtirma gapning to'g'ri shaklini toping: The teacher asked, "Have you finished?"
options: The teacher asked if I had finished.
The teacher asked if I have finished.
The teacher asked whether had I finished.
The teacher asked that I had finished.
explanation: Umumiy so'roqli gaplar 'if' bilan bog'lanadi va zamon Past Perfect ga o'tadi.

subject: ingliz
question: Mos olmoshni tanlang: I don't have ... money with me.
explanation: Inkor gaplarda 'any' olmoshi ishlatiladi.

question: Mos olmoshni tanlang: She cut ... while she was chopping vegetables.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos modal fe'lni qo'ying: You ... wear a uniform at school. It is a rule.

question: Nuqtalar o'rniga mos modal fe'lni qo'ying: It is very cloudy. It ... rain later.

subject: ingliz
question: Read the short text and answer: "Tom usually gets up at 7 o'clock, but yesterday he got up at 8 because it was Sunday." Why did Tom get up later yesterday?
explanation: Matnda 'because it was Sunday' deb aniq berilgan.
